zh.lifeSummary: 當Johanna Radcliffe於1443年出生在英國藍卡爾布萊克本時，她的父親Alexander Radcliffe42歲，母親Agnes Harington36歲。她於大約1449年與Sir John Talbot在英國結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1487年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾曼徹斯特享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johanna Radcliffe于1443年出生在英国藍卡爾布萊克本时，她的父亲Alexander Radcliffe42岁，母亲Agnes Harington36岁。她于大约1449年与Sir John Talbot在英国结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1487年在英国英格兰藍卡爾曼徹斯特享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Radcliffe
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Ratliff
meanings: English (Suffolk): habitational name from one or more of the places so named, such as Radcliffe (Lancashire), Radcliffe on Trent and Ratcliffe on Soar (both Nottinghamshire), Radclive (Buckinghamshire), Ratcliffe Culey and Ratcliffe on the Wreake (both Leicestershire), Ratclyffe in Clyst Hydon, Ratcliffes in Thorverton, and Ratcliffes in Broad Clyst (all Devon), Ratcliff in Stepney (Middlesex), and Rackley in Compton Bishop (Somerset). The placenames derive from Old English rēad ‘red’ + clif ‘cliff, bank, steep slope’ (see also Rutley ). A family of the name Radcliffe trace their descent from Sir Nicholas de Radclyffe. He is said to have been a knight who held the major of Radcliffe in Lancashire and served Roger de Poitou, Baron de Marsey in the 11th century.

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Johanna Radcliffe was born in 1443, in Blackburn, Lancashire, England, her father, Alexander Radcliffe, was 42 and her mother, Agnes Harington, was 36. She married Sir John Talbot about 1449, in England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 6 daughters. She died in 1487, in Manchester, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johanna Radcliffe est née en 1443, à Blackburn, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Alexander Radcliffe, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Agnes Harington, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Talbot environ 1449, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1487, à Manchester, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johanna Radcliffe 1443 in Blackburn, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Alexander Radcliffe 42 und ihre Mutter Agnes Harington 36. Sie hat um 1449 in England Sir John Talbot geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1487 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Manchester, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Radcliffe è nata il nel 1443 nel Blackburn, Lancashire, England, sua padre, Alexander Radcliffe, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Agnes Harington, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Talbot circa 1449, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1487, nel Manchester, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Johanna Radcliffeが1443年にイギリスランカシュアイアブラクブルンで生まれた時，父Alexander Radcliffeは42歳，母Agnes Haringtonは36歳であった。約1449年にイギリスでSir John Talbotと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1487年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアマンチェスターで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Johanna Radcliffe(이)가 1443년 영국 랭카실르 블랙번에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Alexander Radcliffe(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Harington(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 대략 1449년 영국에서 Sir John Talbot(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1487년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 먼체스터에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Radcliffe nasceu em 1443, em Blackburn, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Alexander Radcliffe, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Harington, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Talbot aproximadamente 1449, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1487, em Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johanna Radcliffe родилась в 1443 г. в местности блэккбурн, ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Alexander Radcliffe было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Harington, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Talbot около 1449 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1487 г. в местности манчестир, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johanna Radcliffe nació en 1443, en Blackburn, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Alexander Radcliffe, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Agnes Harington, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Sir John Talbot aproximadamente 1449, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1487, en Manchester, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 44 años.
